creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 191196
Patch that enables concurrent installations

Hello,

attached is a patch which enables concurrent installations for different Python versions:

- added "concurrent" to USE_PYTHON
- bumped PORTREVISION

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1Ramd64 + i386) -> OK
- portlint -> OK

--
Cheers
Kai
